campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transit authority finances, adopt a new policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and address staffing challenges in filling city jobs.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026
New policy prohibiting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City hiring challenges and employee retention efforts

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the County, and voted to move forward with the cleanup work. The council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and established a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by the County
New Technology Disruption Policy replacing previous city technology guidelines
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several spending and contract decisions. Key approvals included accepting a donated defibrillator, signing a five-year service agreement, awarding a paving contract to O'Grady Paving, and submitting grant applications.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Approved construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Authorized grant applications for statewide funding
Set list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council focused on organizing the June 2 draft agenda and approving various city-sponsored events.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning and new items
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
Approval of council-sponsored events

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes and hear public comments from residents. The council selected and recommended applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee and reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
Approval of previous meeting minutes
Upcoming board and commission schedules

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to conduct official business and recognize two important observances. The council used the meeting to honor Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month, highlighting these community priorities.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety plan that guides development through 2040, recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, trees, facilities and sustainability during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (2015-2040)
Public Works Department recognition for infrastructure, sustainability, and maintenance
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026 to discuss issues related to the city's station area. The meeting was held in person at City Hall and also available online via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Meeting held at City Hall East Wing, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Hybrid format: in-person and Zoom participation available

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, to address several land development and administrative matters. The council considered new ordinances, approved a site development permit amendment and map changes, processed an assessment confirmation, and appointed a permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New ordinance proposals related to city code sections
Site development permit amendment and land use map approval
Assessment confirmation and ordering process
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric appliances and heating systems in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs that would help the city meet air quality standards set by the regional air district.
keyTopics: Residential electrification update on converting homes from gas to electric
Proposed principles to guide the city's electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements for the city
Staff presentation on program status and next steps
